title: WC2026 Fixture Scraper Input
description: Configure what data to scrape from the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

filter_group.title: Filter by Group (optional)
filter_group.description: Return only fixtures for a specific group. Leave empty for all 104 matches. Example: A, B, L

filter_team.title: Filter by Team (optional)
filter_team.description: Return only fixtures involving a specific team. Example: Brazil, England, Japan

language.title: Output Language
language.description: Team and venue names language preference.
